## How It Was Tested


## Checklist

- [ ] `bash tests/validate-repo.sh` passes.
- [ ] `bash tests/validate-docs.sh` passes.
- [ ] Relevant runtime or app tests pass.
- [ ] No whole-compositor Hyprland reloads were added.
- [ ] No XDG environment variables were added outside UWSM.
- [ ] No stale HyprPanel package names were added.
- [ ] No external symlink dependency or command path was reintroduced.
- [ ] Theme changes use `hyprctl keyword source <file>`.
